description.en: CallscallbackFnonce for each key-value pair present in theRTCStatsReportobject, in insertion order. If athisArgparameter is provided toforEach, it will be used as thethisvalue for each callback.

description.en: A positive integer value that indicates the number of RTP Forward Error Correction (FEC) packets which have been received for this source, for which the error correction payload was discarded.

description.en: A positive integer value that indicates the total number of Forward Error Correction (FEC) packets received for this source.

excerpt.es: A positive integer value that indicates the total number of Forward Error Correction (FEC) packets received for this source.
excerpt.en: A positive integer value that indicates the total number of Forward Error Correction (FEC) packets received for this source.

description.en: Returns a string containing a unique identifier that is the same for any candidates of the same type, share the same base (the address from which the ICE agent sent the candidate), and come from the sameSTUNserver. This is used to help optimize ICE performance while prioritizing and correlating candidates that appear on multipleRTCIceTransportobjects.

description.en: A string that uniquely identifies the candidate across multiple transports. Corresponds toRTCIceCandidate.foundation.

description.en: A positive integer that indicates the total number of correctly decoded frames for this RTP stream that consist of more than one RTP packet.Undefined for audio streams.

description.en: A long integer value that indicates the total number of frames of video which have been correctly decoded so far for this media source. This is the number of frames that would have been rendered if none were dropped.Undefined for audio streams.

description.en: The number of frames that have been successfully encoded so far for sending on this RTP stream.Undefined for audio streams.
